exercises.stem: If you ___ hard, you will pass the exam.
exercises.analysis: if 引导的条件状语从句遵循「主将从现」原则，从句用一般现在时 study。

exercises.stem: I will not forgive you ___ you apologize.
exercises.analysis: 句意是「除非你道歉，否则我不会原谅你」。unless = if...not，符合语境。

exercises.stem: We will go hiking if it ___ tomorrow.
exercises.analysis: if 从句用一般现在时的否定形式 doesn't rain，不能用 will。

exercises.stem: In the sentence "If it will rain, we will stay home", the tense usage is correct.
exercises.analysis: if 条件句中从句不能用 will，应该用一般现在时。正确形式：If it rains, we will stay home.

segments: You will fail ___1___ you don't study for the test.
I will call you when I ___2___ (arrive) at the airport.
exercises.analysis: 第一句可以用 unless（= if...not）或 if（但需要加 not）。第二句 when 引导的时间从句也遵循主将从现，用一般现在时 arrive。

exercises.question: 用正确时态填空并解释原因：If I ___ (be) you, I ___ (accept) the offer.
exercises.referenceAnswer: If I were you, I would accept the offer。理由：这是虚拟条件句，表示与现在事实相反的假设，从句用一般过去时（be 动词用 were），主句用 would + 动词原形。
scoringPoints: 正确使用 were（虚拟语气 be 动词用 were）
能解释这是虚拟条件句
